documentation.value: Returns the value associated with a key in the map as Some(value), or None if the key is not present.
The key to look up in the map.
The map to search in.

signatures.label: Map.update(key: 'key, value: option('value), map: map('key, 'value)): map('key, 'value)

documentation.value: Updates the value associated with a key. If value is Some(v), the binding is updated; if None, the key is removed.
The key to update.
Some(new_value) to set, or None to remove the binding.
The map to update.
Tests whether a key exists in the map. Returns true if the key is present.
The key to test for membership.
The map to test.
Applies a function to each element of a list and returns a new list with the results.
The function to apply to each element.
The input list.
Reduces a list to a single value by applying a function to each element and an accumulator.
The folding function that takes an accumulator and an element.
The list to fold over.
The initial accumulator value.

signatures.label: Tezos.transaction(parameter: 'param, amount: tez, contract: contract('param)): operation

documentation.value: Creates a transaction operation to send tokens to a contract with a parameter.
The parameter to pass to the destination contract's entrypoint.
The amount of tez to transfer.
The target contract handle.
Returns the address of the account that initiated the current transaction (may differ from source).
Returns the absolute value of an integer as a natural number (nat).
The integer value to take the absolute value of.
Converts a natural number (nat) to an integer.
The natural number to convert to int.
